releases.author: flash555588
releases.description:
## What's New in 0.5.3

### Workspace Layout
- **Track-based workspace**: The direct file view now uses a resizable workspace layout. The main preview area gets the full remaining space, while a sidebar on the right and a panel at the bottom provide model information.
- **Draggable resize handles**: Adjust the sidebar width and bottom panel height by dragging the resize handles (similar to IDE split panes).
- **Sidebar content**: Knowledge controls (generate note, open index) and registered part matches now live in the right sidebar, freeing up the bottom panel for model status.

### Knowledge & Part Matching
- **Cross-format part registration**: GLB/GLTF component metadata from \`extras.ai3d\` is now registered as individual parts, preserving component IDs, occurrence IDs, part numbers, and component paths through reports and part notes.
- **Cross-format matching**: Source extensions such as STEP, FBX, 3MF, and DAE are preserved in analysis records so registered part matching can link reused components across converted model formats.
- **Sidebar matches**: Likely reused parts from previously analyzed models are shown in the sidebar with scores and direct links.

### Annotation Improvements
- **Bookmark display modes**: Annotation bookmarks support full snippets, compact surfaces, and dots. Popovers stay open while hovered and occluded bookmarks are fully hidden.
- **STEP XDE labels preserved**: CAD conversion exports PCB/CAD components as individual GLB component meshes with \`extras.ai3d\` identity metadata.

### Removed
- **Explode controls** have been removed from the direct workbench; use disassembly mode instead.

### Fixes
- **Resize handle direction**: Vertical resize now behaves consistently (drag down to shrink, up to expand).
- **Interruption notice**: When switching models quickly, a Notice is shown if the previous load was cancelled by a newer request.
- **Popout window compatibility**: Use \`window\` and \`activeDocument\` instead of \`activeWindow\` and \`document\` for timer and event listener APIs.
- **Type safety**: Add explicit type annotation to avoid implicit \`any\` assignment.

### Compatibility
- Requires Obsidian 1.5.0 or later.
releases.name: AI Model Workbench 0.5.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# AI Model Workbench 0.4.0

0.4.0 turns AI Model Workbench from a 3D preview helper into the foundation of a 3D model knowledge generator for Obsidian.

## Highlights

- Generate first-pass part note drafts for the strongest captured model parts and link them from the main report and analysis sidecar.
- Generate a model knowledge index that collects the report, sidecar JSON, evidence images, annotations, and generated part notes in one Obsidian entry point.
- Add command-palette and direct-workbench actions for opening the generated model knowledge index.
- Preserve user-written index notes by refreshing only the AI-managed index block on repeated generations.
- Add a configurable part notes folder so generated component drafts can live separately from model reports.

## Verification And Release Safety

- Add `npm run verify:knowledge-index` to regression-test index links, managed-section refreshes, and preservation of user notes without launching Obsidian.
- Improve `verify:obsidian -- --clean` so the test closes Obsidian, unregisters the temporary vault, and removes stale `/tmp` paths after diagnostics.
- Release workflow now runs the knowledge-index regression before building assets.
- The published release assets were installed from GitHub Release into a temporary Obsidian vault and verified with `npm run verify:obsidian -- --release-tag 0.4.0 --clean`.

## Assets

Release assets are built from source by GitHub Actions and include only the Obsidian-supported files.

- Manifest version: `0.4.0`
- Minimum Obsidian version: `1.5.0`

| Asset | Size | SHA-256 |
|-------|------|---------|
| `main.js` | 3,902,943 bytes | `460af7be29261977433329729ca1b290b6251610b66f724bc5da37ab64d7235b` |
| `manifest.json` | 285 bytes | `c4aef87f91575928efa8426b7754bb3cc8983bf0026ec6b2ff187c31a6fed442` |
| `styles.css` | 31,991 bytes | `ccbdd302fd5327385b196c9a941f4d8d47796cde192fe9e6eafccb1abcd802a8` |
releases.name: AI Model Workbench 0.4.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# AI Model Workbench 0.3.1

## Highlights

- Adds release-asset Obsidian verification so GitHub release assets can be downloaded and installed into the test vault.
- Hardens legacy `data.json` settings migration with checks for old partial settings.
- Adds `SECURITY.md` with a release-token safety checklist and PAT leak response.
- Upgrades knowledge-note generation into a local evidence pipeline with renderer evidence, part candidates, knowledge nodes, JSON sidecar, evidence snapshot, and an editable local draft.
- Adds an optional remote draft client for knowledge notes. It is local-only by default, sends sanitized evidence to `POST /draft-note` only when configured, and refuses raw model upload.
- Improves direct GLTF external resource loading for `.gltf + .bin + textures`, including URL-encoded paths, spaces, Chinese filenames, and case-insensitive vault lookup.
- Improves OBJ/MTL direct loading with same-directory MTL lookup, texture filename case fallback, non-blocking missing-texture warnings, and clearer missing-resource feedback.

## Release Assets

| Asset | Size | SHA-256 |
|-------|------|---------|
| `main.js` | 3,892,057 bytes | `960cf71d2248d9af94f05d486d76c9fb2048b8f33c003567f4841502c59124fd` |
| `manifest.json` | 285 bytes | `398215b31b30a3f999291cf8a31502a0610ab23085a89500c351866c877baea2` |
| `styles.css` | 31,991 bytes | `ccbdd302fd5327385b196c9a941f4d8d47796cde192fe9e6eafccb1abcd802a8` |

## Verification

- `npm run typecheck`
- `eslint`
- `npm run verify:remote-draft`
- `npm run verify:settings`
- `npm run build`
- `npm run verify:release`
- `npm run verify:obsidian -- --clean`
- `:has(` scan: no matches
- PAT pattern scan: no matches
releases.name: AI Model Workbench 0.3.1

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description:
## Highlights
- Refreshes release assets for version `0.1.7` after renaming the plugin identity to AI Model Workbench.
- Keeps plugin ID and manifest name aligned as `ai-model-workbench` / `AI Model Workbench`.
- Carries forward the manual converter setup flow introduced in `0.1.6`, where converter routes stay opt-in and diagnostics run only when manually triggered.

## Notes
- This release uses plugin ID `ai-model-workbench` and display name `AI Model Workbench`.
- Release assets are limited to `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css`, built from source by GitHub Actions.
- GitHub artifact attestations are published for the release assets.
releases.name: AI Model Workbench 0.1.7

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description:
## Highlights
- Makes model converters default to off, so conversion routes are enabled only when explicitly chosen.
- Moves model converter controls into a secondary settings section that stays collapsed until manually opened.
- Moves environment inspection into its own collapsed secondary settings section and keeps diagnostics idle until manually triggered.
- Refreshes release assets for version `0.1.6` (`main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`, and a convenience zip bundle) under the renamed AI Model Workbench identity.

## Notes
- This release uses plugin ID `ai-model-workbench` and display name `AI Model Workbench`.
- Converter command diagnostics no longer run automatically when the settings tab opens.

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description:
## Highlights
- Fixes the Obsidian manifest plugin ID validation issue by renaming the plugin ID to `ai-three-d-model-workbench`.
- Fixes heading pin badges so note heading links refresh correctly after annotation changes and stale DOM bindings are cleaned up.
- Fixes annotation hover popovers so delayed note previews do not reappear after mouse leave or view teardown.
- Includes refreshed release assets for version `0.1.5` (`main.js`, `manifest.json`, `styles.css`, and a convenience zip bundle).

## Upgrade Notes
- The plugin ID changed from `ai-3d-model-workbench` to `ai-three-d-model-workbench`.
- Manual installs and symlink-based development setups must use the folder `.obsidian/plugins/ai-three-d-model-workbench/`.
- Existing local setups that still use the old plugin folder name should rename the folder before enabling `0.1.5`.

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description:
## Highlights
- Adds annotation preview mode selection, with optional Markdown-rendered note previews.
- Improves macOS converter command discovery and argument handling.
- Expands converter diagnostics with lightweight launch probes for Python environments and native converter CLIs.
- Aligns plugin description with the community submission metadata.

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description:
## Changes
- Localized loading overlays and loading phase text so they follow the plugin language.
- Added translated loading phases for preparing and loading models across direct view, code blocks, and live preview.
- Bumped release metadata to 0.1.2.

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description: 0.1.1 updates the project introduction and refreshes the release metadata. It also includes the recent improvements to localized model-load feedback and heading pin hints.

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description:
## AI 3D Model Workbench 0.1.0

First stable release.

### Features
- Inline 3D preview for `![[model.ext]]` embeds and `` ```3d `` code blocks
- Multi-model grid view via `` ```3dgrid `` (compare, showcase, explode, timeline, gallery presets)
- Annotation pins with heading binding and note hover highlight
- Helper toolbar: reset view, wireframe, axes, bounding box, disassembly, animation, snapshot
- Direct file view for .glb/.gltf/.stl/.obj/.splat/.ply
- Knowledge note generation
- Conversion cache for CAD formats (FreeCAD, assimp, obj2gltf, fbx2gltf)
- i18n (English / 中文)

### Improvements
- Type-safe runtime detection (node-shim refactor)
- Mobile/web compatibility (Buffer → Uint8Array)
- Broader Obsidian version support (setActiveLeaf)
- Clean ESLint baseline (zero suppressions)

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description:
Test prerelease for current UI and cross-platform fixes.

Highlights:
- restore toolbar and annotation icon colors
- show heading bookmark colors and improve color swatches
- add macOS/Linux converter command placeholders, discovery, and docs
- keep this release as prerelease for validation before the next stable tag
releases.name: 0.0.5-beta.0

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description:
## Highlights
- Workbench model loading now syncs only when the active model changes or when a reset is requested.
- Stale async load results are discarded, old preview and error state are cleaned up consistently, and re-import now forces a retry.
- This avoids unnecessary reloads caused by unrelated store updates such as tags, annotations, and autosave.

## Also in this release
- Quick Start and Installation documentation was rewritten to be simpler, clearer, and less misleading.
- Version metadata is aligned at 0.0.4, and the plugin remains available on both desktop and mobile (isDesktopOnly: false).

## Validation
- npx eslint src --ext .ts
- npm run typecheck
- npm run build

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description: Fix ObsidianReviewBot compliance: eslint-plugin-obsidianmd, sentence case, Node.js builtin guards, style improvements, type safety.

releases.author: flash555588
releases.description:
## v0.0.2

### Features
- Heading autocomplete search in annotation pin editor
- Content preview for selected heading sections
- Hover popover for linked notes on annotation pins
- Pin pulse animation when hovering headings
- Pin-to-heading binding (notePath, headingRef, headingLevel)
- normalizeHeadingText() for robust markdown formatting strip

### Bug Fixes
- Remove legacy ^pin-xxx marker support
- Fix hover popover content not showing for formatted headings
- Fix heading badge stale binding after pin deletion

### Docs
- Add comprehensive Syntax Guide to README (EN + ZH-CN)
- Add Syntax Registration section
